title: Igniting Unity Across Africa: UPF Launches the Transformative "100 Days of Harmony and Hope" Campaign on United Nations Day
description: The event took place in conjunction with the celebration of United Nations Day, reinforcing UPF’s continued partnership with the UN in advancing peace, unity, and shared human values throughout Africa.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: Inter Parliamentary Dialogue Enhanced
description: Delegations from over forty national parliaments focusing on the theme of "Peace, Security and Development".
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

description: How science, verification, and dialogue reinforce human security.

title: Science for a Peaceful Future

title: UPF Côte d’Ivoire Celebrates 20 Years of Service
description: Held on August 8–9, 2025, at the Félix Houphouët-Boigny Foundation for Peace Research. The commemoration gathered more than 1,500 participants in person and reached an estimated 3.8 million people online through social media and live broadcasts. The event reflected both the national and international stature of UPF-CI as a leading force for peace and social cohesion.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: UPF–Mali Engages Youth on Peace, Climate, and Digital Leadership for a Sustainable Future
description: UPF–Mali, in collaboration with its partners, commemorated the International Day of Peace 2025 with a youth-focused awareness program held at the Collège Secondaire Moderne Adjara (CSMA) under the theme: “Youth and Peace in the Era of Climate and Digital Transformation: Engagement, Inclusion, and Leadership for a Sustainable Future.”
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: UPF Africa Holds Ceremony Commemorating the 20th Anniversary of UPF and the 45th International Day of Peace in Benin — Tribute to the Co-Founder
description: Held under the theme “As Ambassadors for Peace, let us act now in harmony for the realization of a peaceful world,” the ceremony organized by the Universal Peace Federation (UPF) Africa, in collaboration with its national chapter in Benin, brought together 130 participants in person and around 400 online via Zoom and UPF Africa’s digital platforms.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 🎉 La FPU Célèbre 20 ans d'Action en Faveur de la Paix dans le Monde
description: Pour commémorer cette étape importante, la FPU exprime sa sincère gratitude à ses dizaines de milliers d'ambassadeurs de paix de la Fédération pour la Paix Universelle et à ses partenaires à travers le monde. Leur travail inlassable dans le domaine du dialogue interreligieux, de l'aide humanitaire, de l'éducation, des initiatives environnementales et du leadership moral a permis de rapprocher la vision d'« une seule famille sous Dieu » de la réalité.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 🎉 UPF Celebrates 20 Years of Global Peacebuilding
description: In commemoration of this milestone, UPF extends heartfelt gratitude to its tens of thousands of Ambassadors for Peace of the Universal Peace Federation and partners around the world. Their tireless work in interfaith dialogue, humanitarian relief, education, environmental initiatives, and moral leadership has brought the vision of "one family under God" closer to reality.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 🪴La FPU Burkina Faso Commémore la Journée Mondiale de l'Environnement 2025 : Promouvoir la Paix et la Durabilité
description: La cérémonie visait à soutenir les efforts des Nations Unies pour atteindre les ODD, à promouvoir la paix en mobilisant les chefs religieux, traditionnels et politiques, à renforcer les valeurs familiales en tant que fondement de la cohésion sociale et à sensibiliser à la préservation de l'environnement grâce à des actions concrètes menées par les ambassadeurs de la paix.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 📺Advocate for Peace Through Medias, UPF Burkina Faso on BF1 TV
description: The aim was to promote peace, encourage Ambassadors for Peace to apply the five principles to strengthen national unity and the Peace Ambassador network, develop a culture of peace with greater public involvement, and promote UPF through the media.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 🏛Deuxième Séminaire Parlementaire à l’Assemblée Nationale de São Tomé et Príncipe
description: L’objectif : examiner les enjeux éthiques, démocratiques et sociétaux liés aux mutations numériques, tout en explorant des solutions concrètes pour renforcer la culture de la paix dans la gouvernance parlementaire.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 🏛Second Parliamentary Seminar at the National Assembly of São Tomé and Príncipe
description: Its objective was to examine the ethical, democratic, and societal issues linked to digital transformation, while exploring concrete solutions to strengthen the culture of peace in parliamentary governance.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 🇸🇩🌍 De l'Oubli au Premier Plan
description: Appel à la Paix au Soudan
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 📜 Statement of the Universal Peace Federation on the Escalation Between Israel and Iran
description: UPF recalls the work of its Middle East Peace Initiative, which has long brought together leaders from diverse backgrounds to promote dialogue and cooperation across the region.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 🚭Raising Awareness Among Malian Youth: Conference on the Dangers of Drug Use
description: This initiative aimed not only to raise awareness but also to empower young people with the knowledge and tools to make informed, healthy choices and to remain vigilant against the spread of narcotics in schools and neighborhoods.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 📑 UMOA Trust International Launches in Dar es Salaam, Seals Strategic Partnership with UPF Africa
description: UMOA Trust International, a visionary organization dedicated to peacebuilding, legal advocacy, environmental awareness, youth empowerment, and sustainable development, marked its official launch with an inspiring ceremony in Dar es Salaam in collaboration with the Universal Peace Federation (UPF) Africa and drawing notable dignitaries and leaders
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 🏛La FPU Cameroun et l'AIPP Mobilisent les Parlementaires pour la Paix à l'Assemblée Nationale
description: L'objectif était clair : sensibiliser les législateurs sur leur rôle essentiel dans la résolution des crises du pays à travers une approche centrée sur la paix, conformément à la vision des fondateurs de la FPU. L'initiative a également été inspirée par la récente expérience de la délégation camerounaise en Corée, dirigée par le vice-président de la Chambre des représentants, l'honorable Meboka Muyali Marie Boya, qui est revenu avec un engagement renouvelé en faveur de la défense de la paix par le biais de la législation et de la coopération interconfessionnelle.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 🏳️🌉Réflexion à Mi-année 2025 Année Internationale de la Paix et de la Confiance : une année pour la paix et la confiance : Faire Progresser les Efforts pour Construire des Ponts
description: Déclaration de la Fédération pour la Paix Universelle
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: ⚽️UPF Africa Celebrates International Day of Football
description: Led by UPF Africa Secretary General Dr. Zinsou Paterne, the afternoon kicked off with warm opening remarks from Dr. Adama Doumbia, UPF Africa President. The gathering then turned its attention to the significance of the day, with a reading of the United Nations declaration on International Football Day.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 🏁IAAP Launches Its Inaugural Meeting in Lusaka
description: The International Association of Academicians for Peace (IAAP) officially launched its Zambia chapter with an inaugural meeting held on May 21, 2025, at the Peace Embassy in Lusaka. The event brought together 13 distinguished academic leaders, all united by a common goal: promoting peace and fostering academic collaboration in Zambia.
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa

title: 🏛 Conférence sur les Principes Universels pour l'Unité Nationale et la Restauration des Institutions au Gabon
description: Cet événement avait pour but d'aborder le climat politique actuel au Gabon et d'explorer des stratégies pour restaurer les institutions pendant une période de transition
author: Universal Peace Federation - Africa
